acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler xfce SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The xfce team is responsible for Xfce and LXDE Desktop. The SIG has 4 core members and maintains 89 repositories in the Desktop and Graphics domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler xfce SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler xfce SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler xfce SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler xfce SIG maintains 89 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/xfce.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler xfce SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler xfce SIG has 4 Maintainers, including: dingwenlong, zhanglin, fangyafen. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
